title: OCI IAM and Fusion Activity Correlation
description: Correlates OCI IAM identity events with Fusion Apps sign-in/sign-out and ESS audit activity. Flags identities or source IPs seen in both OCI and Fusion during the search window, which may indicate account misuse or suspicious cross-platform identity activity.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('Type' like 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.*' or 'Type' like 'com.oraclecloud.identitysignon.*' or 'Type' like 'com.oraclecloud.IdentitySignOn.*')) or 'Log Source' = 'Fusion Apps: Sign In - Sign Out Activity Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Fusion Apps: ESS Audit Logs' | eval actor = if('User Name' != '', 'User Name', if(userInternalName != '', userInternalName, if(userID.loginID != '', userID.loginID, if('Source IP' != '', 'Source IP', if('Client IP' != '', 'Client IP', if(ipAddress != '', ipAddress, clientIp)))))) | eval source_type = if('Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs', 'oci_iam', 'fusion') | where actor != '' | stats count as total_events, distinctcount(source_type) as source_type_count, unique('Log Source') as correlated_sources, earliest(time) as first_seen, latest(time) as last_seen by actor | where source_type_count = 2 and total_events > 1 | sort -total_events
falsepositives: Planned identity administration during Fusion rollout or migration
Large scheduled provisioning jobs touching OCI IAM and Fusion identities
Shared break-glass accounts used by multiple administrators
